## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds with no new warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] Public Core types/members have XML doc comments
- [ ] Docs updated (README / SETUP / CHANGELOG) if behavior changed
- [ ] Follows the conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md and CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
